top_weaknesses.issue: Five visual walls on a 300px column: '杠杆之所以这么暴力' (~390 chars), the 2008-vs-structural comparison, the '苗头其实已经露出来了' three-stat run, the 'ServiceNow / 工资税' double-parallel, and the 'PPT假设' four-claim closer.
top_weaknesses.fix: Break the 390-char graf at '...可选消费上。' and '...边际消费倾向。'; turn the '苗头' three stats into a 3-bullet list; split the closer at '...结构性。'.

top_weaknesses.issue: Voice flips between US macro voice ('战后大部分时间', '边际消费倾向') and CN street-level vignette ('上海 IFC...北京回龙观...深圳南山区...苏州工业园') — geographically the chain doesn't add up since the post is about US top-10% spending.
top_weaknesses.fix: Either stay in US (Manhattan/Marin/Austin like the EN version) or explicitly mark the CN cities as a localizing analogy ('换到中国语境...'); don't switch coordinate systems mid-paragraph.

top_weaknesses.issue: Forward-looking specifics (2027 SF/Seattle/Austin housing -11/9/8%, 工资税 below CBO baseline 12%, ServiceNow ARR 23->14%) are written as fait accompli rather than scenario; ICP would caveat the share.
top_weaknesses.fix: Mark each as 'Citrini 推演里...' or 'Citrini 场景中...' so readers don't accuse the post of 宏观爽文; collapse to 1-2 illustrative figures.

top_weaknesses.issue: Metaphor stack reads as deck-y: '承重墙', '传送带', '资产价格回声', '同一个剧情的不同切面', '杠杆这么暴力'.
top_weaknesses.fix: Keep '承重墙' and one other; demote the rest.

top_weaknesses.issue: H2 '早期信号长什么样' and '谁来做下一个十年的可选消费' are slightly informal/口语 and miss searchable keywords.
top_weaknesses.fix: Sharpen to '早期信号：白领招聘下滑与CS毕业生失业率' and '需求端追问：下一个十年的可选消费由谁买单'.

top_weaknesses.issue: Anchor texts 'Citrini 的 2028 场景推演' and bare '7.0%' are descriptive but not conclusion-bearing.
top_weaknesses.fix: Re-anchor as 'Citrini：顶层10%就业下降2%将拖累3–4%可选消费' and '美国新晋 CS 毕业生失业率 7.0%'.

consensus_summary: All four personas score >=7 and SEO calls it ready / 8 — the title is sticky and the H2 outline tells a clean mechanism->signal->forward-question arc. The fixable issues are the same the EN version has plus a unique CN-specific bug: the Shanghai/Beijing/Shenzhen/Suzhou vignette is dropped into a US-top-10% macro argument and breaks the coordinate system.
